description_long: This is a modern, single-story house enclosed by a rectangular yard with a high wall covered in green vines. The house features a large, steeply pitched gable roof in a light color, with a prominent overhang on one side. The yard is divided into green lawn and paved areas, with a sunken seating or water feature in one corner. The main facade has large glass sliding doors opening to the yard, and the exterior walls are clad in light wood or similar material. Minimalist landscaping and clean lines emphasize a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story house with a steep gable roof, large glass doors, and a walled yard featuring green lawn and paved areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the steep gable roof, partial open wall, and the vine-covered yard enclosure.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full roof span and the rectangular yard layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the gable roof, visible yard, and sunken feature in the corner.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main glass entry doors, open living area, and the yard with a sunken feature.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows and sliding glass doors, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large sliding glass doors with no visible steps or porch, under a deep roof overhang.
